title: ShieldSync
description: Shows a clean shield-disable timer over opponents after an axe shield break
body:
# **ShieldSync**
ShieldSync is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.4, 1.21.10, and 1.21.11.

When you disable another player's shield with an axe hit, ShieldSync shows a clean 5-second cooldown timer above that player. The timer color shifts from red toward green as the shield-disable cooldown ends.

### **Features**
Detects axe shield breaks on other players
Shows a compact overhead cooldown timer
Color shifts from red to green over 5 seconds
Toggle overlay with J
Plays a subtle bell sound when the cooldown ends
Client-side only
### **Requirements**
Minecraft 1.21.4, 1.21.10, or 1.21.11
Fabric Loader 0.17.2 or newer
Fabric API
Java 21
**Use the matching JAR for your Minecraft version:**

shieldsync-1.0.0+mc1.21.4.jar
shieldsync-1.0.0+mc1.21.10-1.21.11.jar
Credits
Created by RacoonMC. Helpt by AI
